seo.title: Brokz | Fintech Infrastructure & Trading Technology
seo.description: Institutional-grade fintech infrastructure for brokerages, prop firms, and liquidity providers. Custom web traders, MT4/MT5 plugins, algorithmic trading systems.
seo.keywords: fintech infrastructure, trading platform development, brokerage technology, MT4 MT5 plugins, algorithmic trading software, web trader development

hero.body: White-label MT5, FIX connectivity, algo engines, and deep-liquidity integrations — delivered as a managed service for institutional brokers.

capabilities.body: Four areas. Built from first principles by engineers who understand trading infrastructure.

platforms.title: Trading Platforms
platforms.desc: Custom web traders, management dashboards, broker back-office systems.

algo.title: Algorithmic Systems
algo.desc: Execution engines, backtesting, quantitative strategy infrastructure.

mt.title: MT4 / MT5 Extensions
mt.desc: Manager tools, risk plugins, bridges, execution optimization for MetaTrader.

data.title: Data Infrastructure
data.desc: Quantitative modeling pipelines, tick-level market data, trading analytics.

trust.title: Brokerages, prop firms, fintech startups, and liquidity providers.

referenceArch.body: Three layers. End to end, fully owned by the client.

howWeEngage.body: Scoped before commitment. Architected before code. Delivered with ownership.

discovery.title: Discovery
discovery.body: Technical scoping with your engineering team. Infrastructure audit, latency and compliance constraints.

architecture.title: Architecture
architecture.body: System design before implementation. Module boundaries, data flows, failure modes — reviewed with your team.

build.title: Build
build.body: Iterative delivery with weekly demos. Against production-like environments from week one.

deploy.title: Deploy & Handover
deploy.body: Production cutover with full knowledge transfer. Codebase, infrastructure, runbook — yours.
